name: alibabacloud-polardb-ai-assistant
description: Alibaba Cloud PolarDB Database AI Assistant. For PolarDB MySQL/PostgreSQL cluster management, performance diagnostics, parameter tuning, slow SQL analysis, backup recovery, connection session analysis, primary-standby switchover diagnostics, security configuration audit, and other O&M operations. Use when user questions involve PolarDB, cluster IDs starting with pc-, kernel parameters, primary-standby switchover, IMCI columnar storage, etc.
